parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance to be worked on
is the IPI Instance to be worked on

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful XST_FAILURE in case of failure

briefdescription.para: This function triggers an IPI to a destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the Mask of the CPU to which IPI is to be triggered
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

memberdef.argsstring: (XMailbox *InstancePtr, u32 RemoteId, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType, u8 Is_Blocking)
memberdef.name: XMailbox_SendData

briefdescription.para: This function sends an IPI message to a destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the Mask of the CPU to which IPI is to be triggered
is the pointer to Buffer which contains the message to be sent
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
is the type of buffer (XILMBOX_MSG_TYPE_REQ (OR) XILMBOX_MSG_TYPE_RESP)
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

memberdef.argsstring: (XMailbox *InstancePtr, u32 SourceId, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType)
memberdef.name: XMailbox_Recv

briefdescription.para: This function reads an IPI message.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the Mask for the CPU which has sent the message
is the pointer to Buffer to which the read message needs to be stored
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
is the type of buffer (XILMBOX_MSG_TYPE_REQ or XILMBOX_MSG_TYPE_RESP)

briefdescription.para: This routine installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType.

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ----------------------- -------------------------------------------------- XMAILBOX_RECV_HANDLER Recv handler XMAILBOX_ERROR_HANDLER Error handler

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMailbox instance.
specifies which callback is to be attached.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the shared memory location for IPI usage.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMailbox instance.
Address of shared memory location
Size of the memory location

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - if memory is set for IPI usage

briefdescription.para: This function returns the shared memory location for IPI usage.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMailbox instance.
Pointer to the address of the variable for which memory needs to be assigned

listitem.para: Size Size of the memory allocated for IPI usage

briefdescription.para: This function releases the shared memory.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE - if memory is not released

briefdescription.para: This typedef contains XMAILBOX shared memory state.
This typedef contains XMAILBOX Handler Types.
Data structure used to refer XilMailbox.

simplesect.para: : The following function pointers XMbox_IPI_Send, XMbox_IPI_SendData, XMbox_IPI_Recv will be deprecated in 2026.2 and will be made obsolete in 2027.1 release.XilMailbox structure

briefdescription.para: Address of the shared memory location.
Size of the shared memory location.
Triggers an IPI to a destination CPU.

memberdef.definition: u32(* XMboxTag::XMbox_IPI_SendData)(struct XMboxTag *InstancePtr, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType, u8 Is_Blocking)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct XMboxTag *InstancePtr, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType, u8 Is_Blocking)
memberdef.name: XMbox_IPI_SendData

briefdescription.para: Sends an IPI message to a destination CPU.

memberdef.definition: u32(* XMboxTag::XMbox_IPI_Recv)(struct XMboxTag *InstancePtr, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct XMboxTag *InstancePtr, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType)
memberdef.name: XMbox_IPI_Recv

memberdef.name: XMbox_IPI_SendById

briefdescription.para: Triggers an IPI to a destination CPU.

memberdef.definition: u32(* XMboxTag::XMbox_IPI_SendDataById)(struct XMboxTag *InstancePtr, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType, u32 RemoteId, u8 Is_Blocking)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct XMboxTag *InstancePtr, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType, u32 RemoteId, u8 Is_Blocking)
memberdef.name: XMbox_IPI_SendDataById

briefdescription.para: Sends an IPI message to a destination CPU.

memberdef.definition: u32(* XMboxTag::XMbox_IPI_RecvById)(struct XMboxTag *InstancePtr, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u32 SourceId, u8 BufferType)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct XMboxTag *InstancePtr, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u32 SourceId, u8 BufferType)
memberdef.name: XMbox_IPI_RecvById

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the error interrupt callback.
To be passed to the receive interrupt callback.
Agent to store IPI channel information.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance to be worked on
is the IPI Instance to be worked on

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful XST_FAILURE in case of failure

briefdescription.para: This function triggers an IPI to a destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance.
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS in case of success XST_FAILURE in case of failure
This API will be deprecated in 2026.2 and will be made obsolete in 2027.1 release. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with XIpiPs_SendById.

briefdescription.para: This function triggers an IPI to a destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance.
Mask of the CPU to which IPI is to be triggered
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS in case of success XST_FAILURE in case of failure

memberdef.argsstring: (XMailbox *InstancePtr, void *MsgBufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType, u8 Is_Blocking)

briefdescription.para: This function sends an IPI message to a destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the pointer to Buffer which contains the message to be sent
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
is the type of buffer
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS in case of success XST_FAILURE in case of failure
This API will be deprecated in 2026.2 and will be made obsolete in 2027.1 release. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with XIpiPs_SendDataById.

memberdef.argsstring: (XMailbox *InstancePtr, void *MsgBufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType, u32 RemoteId, u8 Is_Blocking)

briefdescription.para: This function sends an IPI message to a destination CPU.

is the pointer to Buffer which contains the message to be sent
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
is the type of buffer
Mask of the CPU to which IPI is to be triggered
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS in case of success XST_FAILURE in case of failure

briefdescription.para: This function reads an IPI message.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the pointer to Buffer to which the read message needs to be stored
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
is the type of buffer

briefdescription.para: This function reads an IPI message.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the pointer to Buffer to which the read message needs to be stored
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
Device Mask for the CPU which has sent the message
is the type of buffer

briefdescription.para: This function implements the interrupt handler.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance

briefdescription.para: This function implements the interrupt handler for errors.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance

briefdescription.para: Poll for an acknowledgement using Observation Register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS in case of success XST_FAILURE in case of failure
This API will be deprecated in 2026.2 and will be made obsolete in 2027.1 release. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with XIpiPs_PollforDoneById.

briefdescription.para: Poll for an acknowledgement using Observation Register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
Mask of the destination CPU from which ACK is expected

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS in case of success XST_FAILURE in case of failure

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the scugic instance
Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the interrupt id of the IPI

briefdescription.para: This function returns the version number of xilmailbox library.
